description_long: This object is a vintage-style biplane with a bright red fuselage and white double wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century aircraft. The wings are stacked vertically and supported by struts, with visible black machine gun mounts on the upper wing. The nose features a prominent gray propeller and a detailed engine cowling. The tail section is red with a white vertical stabilizer, adorned with a roundel insignia, and a small tail skid. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield and visible seat. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a rear skid, suitable for grass or dirt runways.
description: A classic red and white biplane with double wings, open cockpit, and a front-mounted propeller. Features include machine gun mounts, roundel insignia, and vintage landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the double wings, central propeller, and machine gun mounts on the upper wing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the red fuselage, open cockpit, and the roundel insignia on the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail section, vertical stabilizer, and the alignment of the wings and landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by struts; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located just behind the upper wing, single-seat with a small windshield.
